audience: Gamers who love retro-futurist cyberpunk and want a cute card game that feels like a secret drop
creative_direction: Retro-futuristic cyberpunk room that feels like a playable future: neon, screens, soft haze, but still a real interior. Card-o-Bot cards appear as crisp holograms floating in a deal-ready fan or stack in mid-air, still reading as real card faces/backs, not UI chrome. Fun, game-ad energy. Photoreal. No campaign text in the image.

products.name: Hologram Deal
products.asset_hint: Image 1 is the custom FRONT. Other images are official backs / more fronts. In a retro-futuristic cyberpunk room, show these as hologram cards floating mid-air in a neat deal-ready fan or short stack, still looking like real Card-o-Bot cards. Soft volumetric glow. Fun game-ad vibe. Photoreal. No text.
products.notes: Hologram floating cards in cyberpunk room. Still readable as real cards.
